_comment: EXTRACTED from docs/schemas/tenant-config.schema.json :: customAlertInstance (ADR-024 §S6b, #741). This is the frontend end of the cross-language enum contract (Python compiler / Go preflight / TS form). DO NOT hand-drift: tools/portal/tests/recipe-enums.drift.test.ts reads the live schema and asserts these arrays + patterns match (CI Portal Tests reddens on drift). 'severity' is a value:severity UI convention enforced by the Go validator, not a standalone schema enum, so it is asserted by value not extracted.
